headline.line2: Customers naturally invite others into their shopping sessions, driving new traffic with higher intent.

cards.title: Stop losing group purchases
cards.description: Customers rarely shop alone. They ask friends, partners or roommates before buying. Appstract makes it easy to shop together and unlock group discounts directly on your product pages.

cards.title: Conversion grows when shopping becomes social
cards.description: Buying decisions rarely happen alone. Shared shopping introduces collaboration into the purchase journey — reducing hesitation and accelerating decisions through social proof and group incentives.
features: Social shopping directly in your store

messages.message: Girls look at this! 👀 I’m about to place an order and there’s a discount if we order 2 or more. Anyone want me to add something for them?
Perfect. Just add products to our shared cart and we'll hit the discount! 🙌
